fa-0.appearanceId: single round digit zero glyph; closed oval numeral character
fa-0.functionalityId: inserts or displays the numeral zero; labels a value as zero
fa-0.intentId: represent the numeric value zero; indicate a null or empty quantity

fa-00.appearanceId: two round digit zero glyphs side by side; double zero numeral pair
fa-00.functionalityId: inserts or displays a double-zero value; labels a quantity as double zero
fa-00.intentId: represent a double-zero quantity or code; indicate a secondary zero denomination

fa-1.appearanceId: single upright numeral one glyph; tall vertical digit character
fa-1.functionalityId: inserts or displays the numeral one; labels an item as number one
fa-1.intentId: represent the numeric value one; mark the first position or rank

fa-100.appearanceId: three-digit numeral one hundred; digits 1-0-0 in a row
fa-100.functionalityId: indicates a perfect or full score of one hundred; marks a value as completely full
fa-100.intentId: represent a perfect score or complete quantity; signal one hundred percent completion

fa-2.appearanceId: single curved numeral two glyph; digit with horizontal base and curved upper stroke
fa-2.functionalityId: inserts or displays the numeral two; labels an item as number two
fa-2.intentId: represent the numeric value two; mark the second position or rank

fa-3.appearanceId: single numeral three glyph with two curved bumps; open-curve digit facing right
fa-3.functionalityId: inserts or displays the numeral three; labels an item as number three
fa-3.intentId: represent the numeric value three; mark the third position or rank

fa-360-degrees.appearanceId: circular arrow forming a complete loop with degree symbol; full-circle rotation indicator
fa-360-degrees.functionalityId: activates a full 360-degree rotation view; rotates an element or panorama completely around
fa-360-degrees.intentId: view content from every angle; enable a full-circle or panoramic perspective

fa-4.appearanceId: numeral four with angled horizontal crossbar and vertical stroke; digit with open angular top
fa-4.functionalityId: inserts or displays the numeral four; labels an item as number four
fa-4.intentId: represent the numeric value four; mark the fourth position or rank

fa-5.appearanceId: numeral five with flat top and curved lower bowl; digit with horizontal cap and rounded base
fa-5.functionalityId: inserts or displays the numeral five; labels an item as number five
fa-5.intentId: represent the numeric value five; mark the fifth position or rank

fa-6.appearanceId: numeral six with descending curved stroke and closed lower loop; digit curling into a bottom circle
fa-6.functionalityId: inserts or displays the numeral six; labels an item as number six
fa-6.intentId: represent the numeric value six; mark the sixth position or rank

fa-7.appearanceId: numeral seven with horizontal top stroke and diagonal leg; angular digit slanting downward
fa-7.functionalityId: inserts or displays the numeral seven; labels an item as number seven
fa-7.intentId: represent the numeric value seven; mark the seventh position or rank

fa-8.appearanceId: numeral eight formed by two stacked circles; digit with upper and lower closed loops
fa-8.functionalityId: inserts or displays the numeral eight; labels an item as number eight
fa-8.intentId: represent the numeric value eight; mark the eighth position or rank

fa-9.appearanceId: numeral nine with closed upper loop and descending tail; digit with top circle and downward stroke
fa-9.functionalityId: inserts or displays the numeral nine; labels an item as number nine
fa-9.intentId: represent the numeric value nine; mark the ninth position or rank

fa-a.appearanceId: bold uppercase letter A with two diagonal legs and a horizontal crossbar; peaked triangular letter glyph
fa-a.functionalityId: inserts or labels the letter A; selects or navigates to an A-categorized item
fa-a.intentId: represent the first letter of the alphabet; identify something indexed or labeled A

fa-abacus.appearanceId: rectangular frame with horizontal rods strung with sliding beads; counting rack with bead rows
fa-abacus.functionalityId: opens a manual calculation or counting tool; navigates to arithmetic or math features
fa-abacus.intentId: perform a count or calculation manually; access math or educational tools

fa-accent-grave.appearanceId: single back-leaning diagonal tick mark; short leftward-slanting accent stroke
fa-accent-grave.functionalityId: inserts a grave accent character; opens or formats an inline code block
fa-accent-grave.intentId: compose an accented letter or typographic mark; switch to code formatting mode

fa-acorn.appearanceId: rounded oval nut body topped by a textured hatched cap; seed with ribbed dome hat
fa-acorn.functionalityId: inserts an acorn or autumn-season symbol; tags content with a nature or growth theme
fa-acorn.intentId: represent autumn, nature, or organic growth; indicate a small beginning or seed-stage concept

fa-ad.appearanceId: rectangle containing the bold letters A and D; compact labeled banner block
fa-ad.functionalityId: toggles or views an advertisement placement; opens ad management settings
fa-ad.intentId: manage or review advertising content; configure sponsored placements

fa-add.appearanceId: symmetric plus sign with equal horizontal and vertical strokes; four-armed cross shape
fa-add.functionalityId: creates a new item or entry; adds an element to the current list or collection
fa-add.intentId: introduce something new to the current context; expand a list or collection with a new item

fa-address-book.appearanceId: book with tabbed side edge and a person silhouette on the cover; bound contact ledger with profile graphic
fa-address-book.functionalityId: opens the contacts or address directory; navigates to the saved contacts list
fa-address-book.intentId: find or manage contact information; look up a person's address or details

fa-adjust.appearanceId: circle divided vertically with left half dark and right half light; half-filled split circle
fa-adjust.functionalityId: toggles or adjusts the display contrast setting; switches between light and dark theme modes
fa-adjust.intentId: control the contrast or brightness of the interface; change the visual theme to suit the environment

fa-air-conditioner.appearanceId: wide rectangular appliance unit with horizontal vent slats across the front; boxy HVAC panel with louver grille
fa-air-conditioner.functionalityId: controls or toggles the air conditioning unit; opens climate control settings
fa-air-conditioner.intentId: regulate indoor temperature through cooling; manage HVAC or smart home climate settings

fa-air-freshener.appearanceId: pine tree silhouette hanging from a small tag cutout; triangular tree shape on a dangling label
fa-air-freshener.functionalityId: indicates or toggles a fragrance or air freshener setting; opens scent or freshness controls
fa-air-freshener.intentId: represent a fresh scent or odor elimination feature; access fragrance or air quality settings

fa-airplay.appearanceId: rectangle screen with a small upward-pointing triangle centered at its base; monitor outline with a beaming triangle
fa-airplay.functionalityId: streams or mirrors content to an external display; casts the current media to a connected screen
fa-airplay.intentId: show content on a TV or larger external screen; wirelessly share the display to another device

fa-alarm-clock.appearanceId: round clock face with two small bells on top and a dial in the center; circular timepiece with twin top knobs
fa-alarm-clock.functionalityId: opens or sets an alarm for a specific time; enables a timed reminder or scheduled alert
fa-alarm-clock.intentId: schedule a wake-up or reminder event; be notified at a chosen time

fa-alarm-exclamation.appearanceId: round alarm clock with a bold exclamation mark overlaid; clock bell shape with an alert symbol
fa-alarm-exclamation.functionalityId: triggers or highlights an urgent alarm notification; flags an alarm as high-priority
fa-alarm-exclamation.intentId: draw attention to a critical time-sensitive alert; acknowledge an emergency or urgent reminder

fa-alarm-plus.appearanceId: round alarm clock with a small plus sign overlaid or adjacent; clock bell shape with an add symbol
fa-alarm-plus.functionalityId: creates a new alarm or reminder; adds another scheduled alert
fa-alarm-plus.intentId: set up a new timed reminder; add an additional alarm to the list

fa-alarm-snooze.appearanceId: round alarm clock with one or more Z letters beside it; sleeping clock with snooze symbol
fa-alarm-snooze.functionalityId: snoozes or delays an active alarm; postpones the current alert for a short interval
fa-alarm-snooze.intentId: get a brief extra rest before the alarm repeats; defer a reminder without fully dismissing it

fa-album.appearanceId: square record sleeve with a visible spine edge; flat album cover with side binding
fa-album.functionalityId: opens or plays a music album; navigates to the album detail view
fa-album.intentId: browse or listen to a specific album; view the tracks within a music release

fa-album-circle-plus.appearanceId: square album sleeve with a small circle-plus badge in the corner; record cover with an add indicator
fa-album-circle-plus.functionalityId: creates and adds a new music album; saves a new album to the library
fa-album-circle-plus.intentId: start building a new album collection; add a music release to the library

fa-album-circle-user.appearanceId: square album sleeve with a small circle-person badge in the corner; record cover with a user avatar indicator
fa-album-circle-user.functionalityId: assigns or links an album to a specific user; opens the album associated with a user profile
fa-album-circle-user.intentId: connect a music album to a user account; view albums belonging to a particular person

fa-album-collection.appearanceId: multiple square album sleeves fanned or stacked together; overlapping record covers forming a stack
fa-album-collection.functionalityId: opens a grouped collection of music albums; browses the full album library view
fa-album-collection.intentId: explore a curated set of music releases; manage or view multiple albums at once

fa-album-collection-circle-plus.appearanceId: stacked album sleeves with a circle-plus badge overlaid; fanned record covers with an add indicator
fa-album-collection-circle-plus.functionalityId: adds a new album to the existing collection; expands the library with another release
fa-album-collection-circle-plus.intentId: grow a music collection by adding more albums; create a new entry in a grouped album set

fa-album-collection-circle-user.appearanceId: stacked album sleeves with a circle-person badge overlaid; fanned record covers with a user avatar indicator
fa-album-collection-circle-user.functionalityId: assigns the album collection to a specific user; opens the collection linked to a user profile
fa-album-collection-circle-user.intentId: associate a set of albums with a person or account; view another user's full album library

fa-alicorn.appearanceId: horse figure with large spread wings and a single spiral horn on its forehead; winged unicorn silhouette
fa-alicorn.functionalityId: inserts or selects a mythical alicorn creature symbol; tags content with a fantasy or magical theme
fa-alicorn.intentId: represent a fantasy or magical context; use a whimsical creature motif in content

fa-alien.appearanceId: large oval head tapering to a pointed chin with oversized almond-shaped eyes; smooth extraterrestrial face silhouette
fa-alien.functionalityId: inserts or selects an alien creature symbol; tags content with a sci-fi or otherworldly theme
fa-alien.intentId: represent science fiction or extraterrestrial content; signal an out-of-this-world or unusual concept

fa-alien-8bit.appearanceId: blocky pixelated alien figure made of square tiles; retro sprite-style creature composed of grid blocks
fa-alien-8bit.functionalityId: inserts or selects a retro pixel-art alien symbol; tags content with an arcade or video game theme
fa-alien-8bit.intentId: represent a retro gaming or 8-bit aesthetic; evoke classic arcade or pixel-art culture

fa-align-center.appearanceId: three horizontal lines of alternating lengths centered on a shared vertical axis; stacked text lines symmetrically centered
fa-align-center.functionalityId: center-aligns selected text or content; sets paragraph alignment to centered
fa-align-center.intentId: visually center text within its container; apply centered text formatting to a selection

fa-align-justify.appearanceId: four horizontal lines of equal full width stacked evenly; text lines all stretching to both edges
fa-align-justify.functionalityId: justifies selected text to fill the full line width; sets paragraph alignment to justified
fa-align-justify.intentId: make text flush on both left and right margins; create even block text formatting

fa-align-left.appearanceId: three horizontal lines of varying length all starting from the same left edge; stacked text lines left-anchored
fa-align-left.functionalityId: left-aligns selected text or content; sets paragraph alignment to left
fa-align-left.intentId: anchor text to the left margin; apply standard left-aligned text formatting

fa-align-right.appearanceId: three horizontal lines of varying length all ending at the same right edge; stacked text lines right-anchored
fa-align-right.functionalityId: right-aligns selected text or content; sets paragraph alignment to right
fa-align-right.intentId: push text flush against the right margin; apply right-aligned text formatting to a selection

fa-align-slash.appearanceId: text alignment lines overlaid with a diagonal slash through them; stacked horizontal lines crossed by a strike-through diagonal
fa-align-slash.functionalityId: removes or clears text alignment formatting; disables the current paragraph alignment setting
fa-align-slash.intentId: reset text to its default or no-alignment state; remove an applied alignment from a block of text

fa-allergies.appearanceId: open hand with raised bump marks scattered across the skin; palm outline with hive welts on the surface
fa-allergies.functionalityId: flags or records an allergic reaction; opens allergy or sensitivity information
fa-allergies.intentId: document or view allergy and sensitivity details; warn about a potential allergic response

fa-alt.appearanceId: the three letters A, L, T displayed inline as a label; compact ALT text glyph
fa-alt.functionalityId: triggers an alternate keyboard input mode; shows or uses an Alt key shortcut reference
fa-alt.intentId: access alternate character or command options; invoke keyboard modifier shortcuts

fa-ambulance.appearanceId: boxy van silhouette with a cross emblem on the side and a beacon light on the roof; emergency vehicle with medical cross marking
fa-ambulance.functionalityId: requests or dispatches emergency medical services; opens emergency contact or response tools
fa-ambulance.intentId: call for urgent medical assistance; access emergency services quickly

fa-amp-guitar.appearanceId: rectangular box with a speaker grille mesh and control knobs on the front panel; boxy amplifier cabinet with round knobs
fa-amp-guitar.functionalityId: opens or accesses guitar amplifier or audio equipment settings; navigates to music gear features
fa-amp-guitar.intentId: manage or configure musical amplification equipment; represent guitar or music production tools

fa-ampersand.appearanceId: stylized curved glyph looping back on itself with a descending tail; flowing figure-eight-like conjunction symbol
fa-ampersand.functionalityId: inserts an ampersand character into text; links or combines two items together
fa-ampersand.intentId: join two terms or elements with an and-symbol; insert a typographic conjunction mark

fa-analytics.appearanceId: vertical bar chart with an upward-trending line graph overlaid; grouped columns beneath a rising data curve
fa-analytics.functionalityId: opens the analytics dashboard or metrics view; displays performance data and trends
fa-analytics.intentId: review data insights and performance trends; understand patterns through charts and statistics
